src: :left_right_arrow: Asciidoctor diagram extension, with support for AsciiToSVG, BlockDiag (BlockDiag, SeqDiag, ActDiag, NwDiag), Ditaa, Erd, GraphViz, Mermaid, Msc, PlantUML, Shaape, SvgBob, Syntrax, UMLet, Vega, Vega-Lite and WaveDrom.
ja: AsciiToSVG、BlockDiag（BlockDiag、SeqDiag、ActDiag、NwDiag）、Ditaa、Erd、GraphViz、Mermaid、Msc、PlantUML、Shaape、SvgBob、Syntrax、UMLet、Vega、Vega-Lite、WaveDrom をサポートする Asciidoctor 図表拡張
